section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician plans to leave the shunt setting for another two to three months.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit management plan regarding device settings and timing, which belongs in the Plan rather than the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician tested the patient using the Tinetti assessment tool.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes a procedure already performed and is more appropriately part of objective findings; its placement in Assessment is organizationally suboptimal but not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician notes the patient is a pleasant and cooperative man.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an observed behavioral/mental status finding, not a management action or plan, so it fits better in Objective than in Plan.
